virtual_rows.ai_exit_reason: 该BTC SHORT 已触发ACTIVE_SIGNAL_DECAY，且最新市场信号与资金流整体明显偏多：BTC LONG 强候选得分高、6h/24h/72h 多窗口净流入强，反向钱包共振明显；同时现价63717.5高于入场63136.5，退出侧出现多笔BTC LONG减仓/平仓，说明原始空头逻辑已失效，短线继续持有的风险收益变差。

ai_trade_result.summary: BTC空头已出现ACTIVE_SIGNAL_DECAY，且当前市场主导信号转为明显偏多：BTC最近现货/钱包流量中强势LONG候选占优，退出侧出现多笔减仓/平仓，价格也已上行至入场上方并伴随明显下影线风险，原始空头逻辑被削弱。综合看，继续持有的风险收益显著变差，建议平仓。

decisions.reason: 该BTC SHORT 已触发ACTIVE_SIGNAL_DECAY，且最新市场信号与资金流整体明显偏多：BTC LONG 强候选得分高、6h/24h/72h 多窗口净流入强，反向钱包共振明显；同时现价63717.5高于入场63136.5，退出侧出现多笔BTC LONG减仓/平仓，说明原始空头逻辑已失效，短线继续持有的风险收益变差。

ai.raw: {"summary":{"market_regime":"mixed_to_selective","timeframe":"3-14d","notes":"BTC has the strongest multi-window accumulation and best wallet-quality mix, but long/short conflict is high so treat as a conditional long, not an aggressive chase. ZEC has strong short flow from money_printer wallets but current price is already extended upward and conflict is non-trivial, so it is more of a watch/conditional short than a clean open. NEAR is a moderate long watch with decent dominance and no conflict, but wallet sample is small. JTO is too single-wallet and lacks money_printer support, so avoid for medium-term contract hunting.","best_candidates":["BTC","NEAR"],"watch_candidates":["ZEC","JTO"]},"signals":[{"coin":"BTC","direction":"OPEN_LONG","confidence":72,"ai_score":81,"action":"OPEN_LONG","reason":"BTC shows the best medium-long accumulation profile in this batch: 10 wallets, 8 smart_money and 2 money_printer, with multi-window buying across 2h/6h/24h/72h/168h and clear accumulation persistence. Funding is not crowded, price is near average entry with no extreme extension, and the 1h/6h flow is constructive. The main drawback is very high long/short conflict, so the signal is strong only if the market holds above the entry zone and new opposing flows do not expand.","risks":["High direction conflict and large opposite_delta_notional mean the long can be whipsawed.","Some top wallets are NEW or have limited realized performance history, reducing trust.","A prior 40x wallet adds risk of forced behavior and liquidation sensitivity.","If BTC loses intraday structure, the accumulation thesis can fail even with supportive wallet flow."],"invalidation":"A decisive move below 63380, or a 1h close below 63180 with follow-through in opposite wallet flow and rising conflict ratio above current levels, invalidates the long setup.","suggested_leverage":"2x-4x","entry_zone":"63420-63720","hold_period_days":"5-12","take_profit_notes":"Primary target zone 64700-65500, then trail toward 66200-67000 if wallet accumulation persists and funding stays contained. Scale out into strength rather than holding full size to the end.","stop_loss_notes":"Hard stop below 63180. If entered on a pullback, consider reducing exposure first on 63400 loss and fully exiting on 63180 breach."},{"coin":"ZEC","direction":"OPEN_SHORT","confidence":54,"ai_score":63,"action":"WATCH","reason":"ZEC has meaningful short-side participation from 3 money_printer wallets and the direction dominance is skewed short over multiple windows. However, wallet quality is only moderate, the sample is small, and price has already moved up strongly with elevated short-term range. That makes it a valid conditional short idea but not clean enough to open immediately without a better pullback or confirmation of rejection.","risks":["Price is already extended upward, so shorting into strength can be late.","Short conflict is not negligible; opposite_delta_notional is material.","Wallet sample is small and includes only one smart_money wallet, lowering signal robustness.","If funding flips or price keeps grinding higher, shorts can get squeezed."],"invalidation":"A sustained 1h close above 476.8 or a break and hold above 479.5 invalidates the short bias.
